author: ShadyTidus
name: ShadyFlags
description: Comprehensive flag system for tracking suspicious accounts. Auto-flags new accounts based on age thresholds with critical/high/medium priorities. Features flag review queue UI, statistics/metrics, configurable moderator roles, and decision logging for ML training data.
install_msg:
ShadyFlags installed!

Commands:
- `/flag` - Manage flags for server members
- `/flagid` - Manage flags by user ID
- `/flagall` - View all flagged members
- `/flagqueue` - Review flagged users with action buttons
- `/flagstats` - View flag statistics
- `/flagset` - Configure settings

Setup:
1. `/flagset channel` - Set mod log channel
2. `/flagset addrole` - Add mod roles (optional)
end_user_data_statement: This cog stores user IDs of flagged users, flag reasons, moderator IDs who created flags, timestamps, and flag decision history.
